select.if: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0207_0201#Sql001 */ A.NAME FROM M_CODE A WHERE A.CODE_TYPE = '74' AND A.CODE_1 = '1' AND A.CODE_2 = '9998' AND A.START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0207_0201#Sql001 */ A.NAME FROM M_CODE A WHERE A.CODE_TYPE = '74' AND A.CODE_1 = '1' AND A.START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ( A.CODE_2 = #{req.brokerCode} OR A.CODE_2 IN ( SELECT B.BROKER_ID FROM TB_MED_USERS_PRIV B WHERE B.USER_ID = #{req.userId} ) )
